songs.name: "Yuukyuu no Catharsis" (Everlasting Catharsis) - Laffey Ver.
songs.audio: audio/songs/Yuukyuu no Catharsis (Laffey Ver.) - ラフィー(CV.長縄まりあ).mp3

battle.line: First things first, we gotta beat the baddies... Yep, hurry...

couple_encourage1.line: Yep. I'm in great condition... What about you, Nevada?

couple_encourage2.line: Let's take a nap together after this... Yeah...

couple_encourage3.line: Laffey's ready, too. Let's launch together...

detail.line: Yeah... You're always looking after Laffey, Commander... That makes me happy...

expedition.line: The commission team returned... Did you know that already? Okay, then I'll go back and sleep...

feeling1.line: Why'd you wake me up... Do you need something, Commander...?

feeling2.line: Does Laffey look unmotivated? You're just imagining it... I'm so motivated... Zzzz...

feeling3.line: I'm not fully awake yet, but... My body and mind are ready for a fight...

feeling4.line: What do you think when you see Laffey... Nope, I don't care. Not one bit...

feeling5.line: Sometimes, even Laffey can change... But no matter how much I change, I'll never stop wanting to be with you, Commander...

headtouch.line: Commander...? You want to take a break...?

hp_warning.line: As long as I can shoot, I won't give up...

login.line: Yep, Laffey took a good nap, so I'm awake and ready for work... probably. What about you, Commander?

lose.line: My battle... isn't over yet... Nope.

mail.line: Commander, Laffey put your letters... right here.

main1.line: I wanted to sit on my rigging and fly directly to the academy, but that wouldn't work, so I ended up walking. I wish I could ride instead of walk...

main2.line: When Laffey needs to remember something, I can just type it into my display panel... So convenient.

main3.line: Does Laffey look stronger now? ...Because I can sleep sitting on my rigging? No? Hmm...

main4.line: This new cargo space is great... All of my favorite drinks are in there... Here. This one's cold, so you can have it...

main5.line: Don't worry about Laffey... Even when I'm asleep, I'm plenty alert... Yep...

mission.line: A new mission arrived. Commander, it's time for work... Aww, I have to, too?

mission_complete.line: We have rewards. Want to see them, Commander?

profile.line: ...Allen M. Sumner-class? That sounds right. Commander, do you like Laffey's new rigging? I'm not waiting for you to compliment me, or anything... Don't know why you'd think so...

propose.line: ...I'm only the Laffey I am now because of how much you care, Commander... Because you're always watching over me... Yep, I promise... Laffey will be together with you forever...

touch.line: When I sat down, I fell asleep... Nnh... It's okay, I won't fall down...

touch2.line: Commander... You really are a pervert...

unlock.line: *yawn*... Laffey's ready, raring, and more motivated than ever... My rigging is the only thing that changed, not me... So don't touch these ears, Commander. They're not real...

upgrade.line: ...Can I nap a little longer, please...?

win_mvp.line: I won... Back to sleep now...

battle_ex.line: Laffey and the Commander are super motivated...

expedition_ex.line: Commission team's home... Just five more minutes of sleep... Nnh, but I wanna go see everyone with the Commander...

feeling5_ex.line: Commander, can I have a second? It's okay... Laffey just wants to nap next to you... I'll be quiet. Zzzz...

home_ex.line: It's not like Laffey wants to be with you for a little longer... Nope, not at all.

hp_warning_ex.line: "The Ship That Would Not Die" won't go down that easy...

login_ex.line: Welcome back... No, I wasn't waiting for you to wake me up... Nuh-uh.

lose_ex.line: Urk... Sorry for worrying you, Commander... It's okay. I won't be disheartened...

mail_ex.line: Commander, don't forget to check your mail...

main6_ex.line: When you're here, Laffey can relax... When I fall asleep, my body will go all limp, too...

main7_ex.line: Commander, want to join the napping club? Well.. You can nap with me even if you're not in the club...

main8_ex.line: Commander, lean on Laffey if you want... Actually... I'd rather lean on you...

mission_ex.line: New missions... After we finish them together, I'm gonna take a nap... Yep, yep.

mission_complete_ex.line: Mission complete... Hm? Laffey can have a reward, too? Okay... Then I want time alone with you, Commander...

touch_ex.line: I'm not thinking about how I want to put my head in your lap and fall asleep... Not one bit.

touch2_ex.line: You're so weird, Commander... But I guess I'm used to it now...

win_mvp_ex.line: Targets eliminated... Wanna go rest together, Commander?

detail.line: My uniform's covered in bunnies, my shoes have bunnies... I love it. Do you like it, Commander...?

expedition.line: Our commission team just got home. The pop-up shop... is about to get really busy...

feeling5.line: Can't get motivated to work... I'm not thinking of slacking off and going to see the Commander... Of course not. Obviously.

headtouch.line: Commander... I'm not eepy, I swear... Okay? Got it?

home.line: Commander, your order...? "Anything as long as I'm with Laffey"? Aw, thank you...

login.line: I haven't been looking all over the place for you... Nope, not at all.

lose.line: Oops, I spilled it... It's okay, though...

main1.line: Laffey's job... is to deliver food to the tables... It's not boring because you're here, Commander... Yep.

main2.line: If Ingraham made a conveyor belt to deliver the food, would Laffey not have to anymore...?

main3.line: I came to help out... so I'll keep doing my best... I'm not thinking about slacking off with Allen... Nope, not at all...

mission_complete.line: Mission complete... Commander, I'm gonna take a nap... Zzzz...

touch.line: My bouncy bunny ears look fun to touch...? Umm... I don't understand...

touch2.line: Commander, you pervert... You're gonna make my bunnies fall off...

unlock.line: Laffey's helping out around the pop-up shop... Commander, sit wherever you want... Any open seat is probably fine.

detail.line: Honorable Lady Laffey owns a big castle full of... umm, pillows? I'm tired... I forgot the setting we agreed on...

feeling5.line: As my most important retainer, Commander... I mean, Magistrate, you'll always be mine... No, Laffey isn't trying to monopolize you. Nope, not at all...

headtouch.line: Magistrate, do you like my bunny ear headband that much...?

home.line: Yaaawn... When I wake up, my Magistrate is back... I'm happy. As a retainer of Honorable Lady Laffey of the Castle of the Bunnies, you can't leave my side without my permission...

login.line: Welcome back, Magistrate... How much of our tour do we have left? A whole day...? Can Laffey change the setting of her territory's size?

mail.line: The bunnies brought mail for you, Magistrate. Take it with you...

main1.line: Cute, fluffy bunnies... Warm and comfy... Magistrate, come pet them...

main2.line: The bunnies are sleeping... Everyone worked hard, so it's time to rest...

main3.line: You can decide where we go next, Magistrate... When are we going? We can think about that after a nap...

mission.line: The government of the Castle of the Bunnies needs our help... You are permitted to take care of it yourself, Magistrate...

mission_complete.line: Our government affairs are dealt with. Back to our tour...

touch.line: Magistrate, do you like cool places? It's nice and cool next to Laffey...

touch2.line: The knot came undone, so Laffey's clothes are about to fall off. Magistrate, you are a pervert...

unlock.line: Mmm, eepy... The honorable Lady Laffey of the Castle of the Bunnies requires rest... Commander... I mean, Magistrate... Our tour must wait for now...
